title: Assigned to several items at the same time, is there anyway that only one email can be sent out instead of several emails?
excerpt: Requesting for an option to group email notifications to assigned board users as opposed to many or multiple single email notifications for tasks. Monday.com support responded that  this functionality is not currently su…

posts.author: Clu (Luke McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml: Requesting for an option to group email notifications to assigned board users as opposed to many or multiple single email notifications for tasks. Monday.com support responded that this functionality is not currently supported.
